sources.title: La Poliziotta Fa Carriera 1976
sources.description: Glitch in the upload system and now there are two copies of this movie. Files are the same. A curious woman is enlisted as a police woman thanks to her looks that impressed a police commissioner who's her neighbor. She spreads havoc since the entry exams and during the first cases she's assigned to, but ends up with a promotion. Yet another film with Edwige and Alvaro Vitali. Same basic plot for most of these, Edwige starts out blundering but saves the day eventually. Italian with optional English Subtiles

sources.title: La Poliziotta Fa Carriera 1976
sources.description: A curious woman is enlisted as a police woman thanks to her looks that impressed a police commissioner who's her neighbor. She spreads havoc since the entry exams and during the first cases she's assigned to, but ends up with a promotion. More Edwige Fenech and Alvaro Vitali comedy. They made a bunch of movies together and Alvaro made more with many of the late 70s early 80s starlets.  Italian with English Subtitles

metadata.Plot: Gianna Amicucci works in the house of the head of her hometown police force and enters the academy with a kickback from him. She is a beautiful woman (she generously sheds clothes during the film) and has to overcome her male colleagues prejudices, but she gains their respect through a series of brilliant operations.
metadata.Writer: Francesco Milizia, Marino Onorati, Michele Massimo Tarantini
metadata.Actors: Edwige Fenech, Mario Carotenuto, Giuseppe Pambieri
